info.title: Dermatolog Pro self-hosted Device Bridge worker observability
info.description: Stage 4U exposes system-admin Device Bridge worker telemetry and command history through the self-hosted backend. Worker tokens, browser hardware APIs, raw payloads, and managed runtimes are not exposed.

get.summary: List Device Bridge worker telemetry and recent command lifecycle
get.description: Returns safe metadata for system admins: bridge worker status, heartbeat timestamps, command counters, and recent command lifecycle rows. Does not return worker tokens, payload_json, result_json, storage paths, patient names, or browser hardware access.

200.description: Safe Device Bridge worker status projection

403.description: Only system_admin can read worker observability
